rationale: Blocks unsafe retention, not signal profitability.
Blocks uncontrolled universe queries, not frozen sample tests.
Requires caveats/coverage, does not require positive performance.
Limits p-hacking, does not force negative result.
Prevents metric shopping, does not prescribe metric value.
Can affect result and must be justified/preregistered.
Can affect opportunity set and must remain adjustable through new preregistration.
Empirical design choice, not governance hard stop.
